what: Newly minted 0n1x citizens + honest welcome grants. Economy is SIMULATED (points have no monetary value). A welcome-grant is a starting balance, NOT an earned credential — credential starts at NEW and only climbs via signed real work. Every passport is signed by the citizen's own key and recovers to its address.
minted_via: onyx_id_grant.mint_and_grant() — the non-CLI identity function (callable from web/onboard/UI, no CLI required)

citizens.custody: self-custody (private key held only by the minting caller)

welcome_grant.economy: SIMULATED — points have no monetary value
welcome_grant.note: starting balance / gesture, NOT an earned credential; credential starts at NEW (0 receipts)

citizens.credential: NEW (0 signed work-receipts — earns from here, never granted)

citizens.custody: fleet-issued (custodial until holder rotates to a self-held key)
